subcodes.first_line: O loving one! Thy letter was received and brought joy to my heart. Praise be to the pure Lord that thou art vigilant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهرپرور نامه ات رسید و سبب شادمانی گردید ستایش ایزد پاک را که هوشیاری و
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @effort; striving
